summary_one_line: Input must encode a GDEF table whose ClassDef header carries a recognized format (1-4) so get_class dispatches a real arm, not default:return 0.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A well-formed GDEF font table: the four-byte tag 'GDEF' at the table directory and a ClassDef subtable whose format field equals one of the recognized values (1,2,3,4), reached after the GDEF magic and offset fields validate. Only then does the switch on u.format take a real case arm instead of the default arm; the blocker is the false (non-default) side of the format dispatch and requires u.format to be a recognized format.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every winner-resolving seed carries the literal ASCII tag GDEF at offset 0x0c-0x0f (47 44 45 46) plus the leading 00 01 00 00 sfnt-version header, so the parser reaches ClassDef::get_class and the format byte selects case 1/2/3/4 — the winner-coverage overlay shows format1/format2 (and format3/format4) get_class arms hit while the L set never reaches them.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds are short, random-byte inputs (e.g. 6-byte 87 0e 0d 0e 22 0e) that never assemble a valid GDEF table directory; the byte-diff shows offsets 0x0c-0x0f hold 47 44 45 46 in W but arbitrary non-GDEF bytes in L, so the loser only reaches ClassDef::get_class via a malformed/absent table and falls through to default:return 0 (the true side that is the globally blocked branch).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc I2SRandReplace reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes the exact GDEF magic / sfnt-version / format constants that the parser compares against, manufacturing the multi-byte literals (the 'GDEF' tag and the format-field values) that plain havoc in naive/value_profile cannot stumble on; this is the I2S input-to-state substitution that both winners (cmplog, vpc) share and both losers (naive, vp) lack.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the default arm of a switch on u.format inside ClassDef::get_class, with format cases 1-4 as the real arms.
The globally blocked side is the false branch of the format dispatch at the blocker line.
Winner seeds reach the recognized-format case arms (format1/format2/format3/format4 get_class) that the loser set never hits.
Winner-resolving seeds carry the literal ASCII tag GDEF at offset 0x0c-0x0f.
The byte diff shows offsets 0x0c-0x0f are fixed to 47 44 45 46 (GDEF) in W but arbitrary non-GDEF bytes in L.
Loser-blocking seeds are short random-byte inputs that do not assemble a valid GDEF table.
Loser seeds take the true (default:return 0) side while winner seeds take the false side, with the blocker hit-count showing L=T1020 F0 vs W=T108 F864.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L2002  T=108 F=864  T=1020 F=0  default:return 0;  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which scans the input for byte sequences matching one CMP operand and substitutes the other, manufacturing literals like the GDEF tag and format values.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
`I2SRandReplace` reads the post-execution `CmpLogObserver` buffer,
picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: Both decisive pairs differ by the I2S technique only (cmplog vs naive, vpc vs vp).
value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace, so the loser of the second pair cannot perform input-to-state substitution.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5484 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 1c44206ca833678e`; the 27-level ancestor chain contains 2 I2S-floor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depth 25 and 26, the lower-bound signal of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in cmplog under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where the GDEF/ClassDef format constants are NOT compared as literals (e.g. format chosen by an uninstrumented computed index) yet cmplog/vpc still resolve the recognized-format arm at the same rate as naive/vp would refute the I2S-substitution attribution.

weakest_evidence_point: The seeds prove the GDEF tag and a recognized format are present in winners, but the byte diff alone does not isolate which CMP (table tag vs format field) is the decisive I2S substitution gating the branch.
